$schema_note: Machine-readable LifeOS→LifeOS rename map. Single source of truth for the rename. Consumed by humans, rename tooling, AND privacy/scrub gates (ShadowRelease G1-G14, sync-docs, DenyListCheck) — a gate grepping for a token that no longer exists passes vacuously, so gates MUST read this map, never hardcode the old mark. See RenamePlan.md for narrative.

casing.rule: Prose/branding/UI always 'LifeOS'. 'LifeOs' only where the PascalCase file convention forces it (e.g. LifeOsThesis.md). 'Life OS' (spaced) is retired.

members: projects/ session dirs encoding old paths
MEMORY/WORK archived ISAs and analysis files
published blog URLs and the LifeOS Maturity Model in public content

transitional.policy: Shims kept exactly one release cycle after the cut, then retired

members.shim: GitHub repo redirect danielmiessler/PAI -> renamed repo
members.retire_after: GitHub-managed, persists until a new repo takes the old name (never create one)

target.policy: Says LifeOS now or at cut per class verdicts below

classes.name: docs-prose-branding
classes.notes: Generated files: edit source+generator, regenerate. RELEASE_TEMPLATES ripple to public repo at next shadow release — deliberate edits only.

classes.name: filesystem-paths-dirs
classes.procedure: one atomic op + compat symlink one release cycle; per-path probes as a migration ISA

classes.name: env-vars-config-keys
classes.procedure: introduce new names, keep PAI_* read-fallbacks one release, then retire; LifeOS/install/install.sh included

classes.name: repo-remote-names
classes.procedure: atomic GitHub rename (stars/clones redirect) -> same-day sweep of all 86 lines; work_repo.json attestation + private-remote URLs updated explicitly (redirects are not forever)

classes.name: _LIFEOS-skill
classes.notes: same sweep as classes 3/4 so routing never points at a dead name; ud/ur/ut shortcuts included

classes.name: mode-banners-hook-regexes
classes.procedure: one coordinated change, byte-parity verified between prompt and hooks

cut_preconditions: LifeOS sensor loop (R3-R7) demonstrably running — rename lands as formality, not migration

In-flight forks reconciled or closed: .claude-fable v7, skill-only shadow release (release root = LifeOS/ skill only, no full .claude/ clone and no root install.sh; installer is LifeOS/install/install.sh; delivery target = v6.0.0, NOT a 6->7 bump), staged 5.0.0/5.1.0 shadow releases
All scrub gates (ShadowRelease G1-G14, sync-docs rules, DenyListCheck) updated to read THIS map programmatically
Staging rehearsal via CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR clone before touching the live tree
Two-repo sync + symlink chain verified green after every stage
G3 TELOS goal (LifeOS to 50K stars) star-redirect continuity confirmed
forbidden: creating any new public repo named LifeOS after the rename (would break the redirect)
